# Code Anchors: Committed Queue

- `.nexus/queue/` — the committed queue surface: one folder per epic (or one decision-only memo) holding gated human artifacts, now also carrying per-user engineer scratch.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — under issue-sourced planning files the epic and story issues and commits nothing to this queue; the entry is no longer created at planning.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — writes the human-prose close record into the epic's committed queue entry; under issue-sourced planning it also materializes the epic and writes the entry itself at close (born at close), and in the --pr post-merge flow commits both on the distillation branch.
- `CLAUDE.md` — the authoring rule that places per-user decision scratch inside the epic's queue entry.
